title: Terafab Keynote | Building AI Chips for Earth & Space
summary:
Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI are launching the most epic chip-building effort ever - combining logic, memory and advanced packaging under one roof.

Terafab will close the gap between today's chip production and the future's demand - a future among the stars.

Join us on our journey – https://terafab.ai

Terafab Keynote: 1:17-27:07
